---
title: "Assignment 1"
author: "Peter Houe Wisnewski"
date: "2026-02-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}
## Global Parameters ##
trials <- 120
agents <- 100
noise <- 0.05
prob_head <- 0.75

```


```{r}

## Random/Biased Agent ##

# biased_agent <- function(prob_head) {
#   
#   choice <- rbinom(1, 1, prob_head)
#   
#   return(choice)
# }


biased_agent_noise <- function(prob_head, noise) {
  
  choice <- rbinom(1, 1, prob_head)
  
  if(rbinom(1, 1, noise)==1){choice =rbinom(1,1,0.5)}
  
  return(choice)
}

```


```{r}
## WSLS Agent ##

# WSLS_agent <- function(prev_choice, feedback){
#   if(feedback==1){
#     choice = prev_choice
#   } else if(feedback==0){
#     choice = 1-prev_choice}
#   return(choice)
# }

WSLS_agent_noise <- function(prev_choice, feedback, noise) {
  
  # Standard WSLS rule
  if (feedback == 1) {
    choice <- prev_choice
  } else if (feedback == 0) {
    choice <- 1 - prev_choice
  }
  
  # Add noise: with probability = noise, randomize choice
  if (rbinom(1, 1, noise) == 1) {choice <- rbinom(1, 1, 0.5)}
  
  return(choice)
}


```


```{r}
# beta_agent <- function(prev_alpha, prev_beta, other_prev) {
#   
#   # Update Beta parameters
#   alpha <- prev_alpha + other_prev
#   beta  <- prev_beta  + (1 - other_prev)
#   
#   # Expected value of posterior
#   rate <- alpha / (alpha + beta)
#   
#   # Choice based on expected value
#   #choice <- rbinom(1, 1, rate)
#   choice <- ifelse(rate >= 0.5, 1, 0)
#   
#   return(list(choice = choice, alpha = alpha, beta = beta))
# }
```

```{r}
## Beta Agent ##
beta_agent <- function(prev_alpha, prev_beta, other_prev, mode = "deterministic") {
  
  # Update parameters
  alpha <- prev_alpha + other_prev
  beta  <- prev_beta  + (1 - other_prev)
  
  # Expected value of posterior
  rate <- alpha / (alpha + beta)
  
  # Choice rule based on mode
  if (mode == "probabilistic") {
    choice <- rbinom(1, 1, rate)
  } else if (mode == "deterministic") {
    choice <- ifelse(rate >= 0.5, 1, 0)
  } else {
    stop("mode must be either 'probabilistic' or 'deterministic'")
  }
  
  return(list(choice = choice, alpha = alpha, beta = beta))
}
```


```{r}

# simulate_Beta_vs_WSLS <- function(trials, noise) {
#   
#   # storage
#   WSLS_choice <- rep(NA, trials)
#   Beta_choice <- rep(NA, trials)
#   alpha <- beta <- rep(NA, trials)
#   
#   # initial states
#   WSLS_choice[1] <- rbinom(1, 1, 0.5)
#   Beta_choice[1] <- rbinom(1, 1, 0.5)
#   alpha[1] <- 1
#   beta[1]  <- 1
#   
#   for (t in 2:trials) {
#     
#     # --- WSLS agent ---
#     if(Beta_choice[t-1]==WSLS_choice[t-1]){feedback=1}else{feedback=0}
#     WSLS_choice[t] <- WSLS_agent_noise(WSLS_choice[t-1], 1-feedback, noise) # WSLS is not matching
#     
#     # --- Beta agent ---
#     res <- beta_agent(alpha[t-1], beta[t-1], WSLS_choice[t-1])
#     Beta_choice[t] <- res$choice
#     alpha[t] <- res$alpha
#     beta[t]  <- res$beta
#   }
#   
#   return(list(WSLS = WSLS_choice,
#               Beta = Beta_choice,
#               alpha = alpha,
#               beta = beta))
# }
# 
# 
# simulate_Beta_vs_WSLS_agents <- function(agents, trials, noise) {
#   
#   results <- vector("list", agents)
#   
#   for (i in 1:agents) {
#     results[[i]] <- simulate_Beta_vs_WSLS(trials, noise)
#   }
#   
#   return(results)
# }


```

```{r}
# simulate_Beta_vs_Biased <- function(trials, prob_head, noise) {
#   
#   # storage
#   Beta_choice   <- rep(NA, trials)
#   Biased_choice <- rep(NA, trials)
#   alpha <- beta <- rep(NA, trials)
#   
#   # initial states
#   Beta_choice[1]   <- rbinom(1, 1, 0.5)
#   Biased_choice[1] <- rbinom(1, 1, 0.5)
#   alpha[1] <- 1
#   beta[1]  <- 1
#   
#   for (t in 2:trials) {
#     
#     # --- Biased agent ---
#     Biased_choice[t] <- biased_agent_noise(prob_head, noise)
#     
#     # --- Beta agent ---
#     res <- beta_agent(alpha[t-1], beta[t-1], Biased_choice[t-1])
#     Beta_choice[t] <- res$choice
#     alpha[t] <- res$alpha
#     beta[t]  <- res$beta
#   }
#   
#   return(list(
#     Beta   = Beta_choice,
#     Biased = Biased_choice,
#     alpha  = alpha,
#     beta   = beta
#   ))
# }
# 
# simulate_Beta_vs_Biased_agents <- function(agents, trials, prob_head, noise) {
#   
#   results <- vector("list", agents)
#   
#   for (i in 1:agents) {
#     results[[i]] <- simulate_Beta_vs_Biased(
#       trials = trials,
#       prob_head = prob_head,
#       noise = noise
#     )
#   }
#   
#   return(results)
# }

```

```{r}
simulate_Beta_vs_WSLS <- function(trials, noise, mode = "deterministic") {
  
  # storage
  WSLS_choice <- rep(NA, trials)
  Beta_choice <- rep(NA, trials)
  alpha <- beta <- rep(NA, trials)
  
  # initial states
  WSLS_choice[1] <- rbinom(1, 1, 0.5)
  Beta_choice[1] <- rbinom(1, 1, 0.5)
  alpha[1] <- 1
  beta[1]  <- 1
  
  for (t in 2:trials) {
    
    # --- WSLS agent ---
    if (Beta_choice[t-1] == WSLS_choice[t-1]) {
      feedback <- 1
    } else {
      feedback <- 0
    }
    WSLS_choice[t] <- WSLS_agent_noise(WSLS_choice[t-1], 1 - feedback, noise)
    
    # --- Beta agent ---
    res <- beta_agent(alpha[t-1], beta[t-1], WSLS_choice[t-1], mode = mode)
    Beta_choice[t] <- res$choice
    alpha[t] <- res$alpha
    beta[t]  <- res$beta
  }
  
  return(list(
    WSLS = WSLS_choice,
    Beta = Beta_choice,
    alpha = alpha,
    beta = beta
  ))
}


simulate_Beta_vs_WSLS_agents <- function(agents, trials, noise, mode = "deterministic") {
  
  results <- vector("list", agents)
  
  for (i in 1:agents) {
    results[[i]] <- simulate_Beta_vs_WSLS(trials, noise, mode = mode)
  }
  
  return(results)
}
```


```{r}

simulate_Beta_vs_Biased <- function(trials, prob_head, noise, mode = "deterministic") {
  
  # storage
  Beta_choice   <- rep(NA, trials)
  Biased_choice <- rep(NA, trials)
  alpha <- beta <- rep(NA, trials)
  
  # initial states
  Beta_choice[1]   <- rbinom(1, 1, 0.5)
  Biased_choice[1] <- rbinom(1, 1, 0.5)
  alpha[1] <- 1
  beta[1]  <- 1
  
  for (t in 2:trials) {
    
    # --- Biased agent ---
    Biased_choice[t] <- biased_agent_noise(prob_head, noise)
    
    # --- Beta agent ---
    res <- beta_agent(alpha[t-1], beta[t-1], Biased_choice[t-1], mode = mode)
    Beta_choice[t] <- res$choice
    alpha[t] <- res$alpha
    beta[t]  <- res$beta
  }
  
  return(list(
    Beta   = Beta_choice,
    Biased = Biased_choice,
    alpha  = alpha,
    beta   = beta
  ))
}

simulate_Beta_vs_Biased_agents <- function(agents, trials, prob_head, noise, mode = "deterministic") {
  
  results <- vector("list", agents)
  
  for (i in 1:agents) {
    results[[i]] <- simulate_Beta_vs_Biased(
      trials    = trials,
      prob_head = prob_head,
      noise     = noise,
      mode      = mode
    )
  }
  
  return(results)
}


```



```{r}
## Simulating 100 agents ##
set.seed(123)  # reproducibility
Beta_D_vs_WSLS <- simulate_Beta_vs_WSLS_agents(agents, trials, noise, mode = 'deterministic')
Beta_P_vs_WSLS <- simulate_Beta_vs_WSLS_agents(agents, trials, noise, mode = 'probabilistic')
Beta_D_vs_Biased <- simulate_Beta_vs_Biased_agents(agents, trials, prob_head, noise, mode = 'deterministic')
Beta_P_vs_Biased <- simulate_Beta_vs_Biased_agents(agents, trials, prob_head, noise, mode = 'probabilistic')
```


```{r}
make_dfs <- function(sim_list, var_other, var_beta = "Beta") {
  
  # Number of agents
  agents <- length(sim_list)
  
  # Build long dataframe
  df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(1:agents, function(i) {
    data.frame(
      agent = i,
      trial = seq_along(sim_list[[i]][[var_other]]),
      Other = sim_list[[i]][[var_other]],
      Beta  = sim_list[[i]][[var_beta]]
    )
  }))
  
  # Compute feedback and cumulative rates
  df$feedback <- ifelse(df$Other == df$Beta, 1, 0)
  
  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(agent) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      cumulative_rateSelf  = cumsum(feedback) / seq_along(feedback),
      cumulative_rateOther = cumsum(1 - feedback) / seq_along(feedback)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()
  
  # Average across agents
  df_avg <- df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(trial) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(mean_self = mean(cumulative_rateSelf))
  
  return(list(full = df, avg = df_avg))
}
```


```{r}

# Converting results into a data frames #
out_D_WSLS <- make_dfs(Beta_D_vs_WSLS, var_other = "WSLS")
df      <- out_D_WSLS$full
df_avg  <- out_D_WSLS$avg


out_P_WSLS <- make_dfs(Beta_P_vs_WSLS, var_other = "WSLS")
df2     <- out_P_WSLS$full
df2_avg <- out_P_WSLS$avg


out_D_Biased <- make_dfs(Beta_D_vs_Biased, var_other = "Biased")
df3     <- out_D_Biased$full
df3_avg <- out_D_Biased$avg

out_P_Biased <- make_dfs(Beta_P_vs_Biased, var_other = "Biased")
df4 <- out_P_Biased$full
df4_avg <- out_P_Biased$avg


```


```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = trial, y = cumulative_rateSelf, group = agent)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.15, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_line(data = df_avg, aes(x = trial, y = mean_self, group = 1), color = "red", size = 1.2) +
  labs(title = "Cumulative Match Rate Across 100 Matchups: Beta_D vs WSLS", x = "Trial", y = "Cumulative Matching Rate") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(df2, aes(x = trial, y = cumulative_rateSelf, group = agent)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.15, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_line(data = df2_avg, aes(x = trial, y = mean_self, group = 1), color = "red", size = 1.2) +
  labs(title = "Cumulative Match Rate Across 100 Matchups: : Beta_P vs WSLS", x = "Trial", y = "Cumulative Matching Rate") +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
ggplot(df3, aes(x = trial, y = cumulative_rateSelf, group = agent)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.15, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_line(data = df3_avg, aes(x = trial, y = mean_self, group = 1), color = "red", size = 1.2) +
  labs(title = "Cumulative Match Rate Across 100 Matchups: : Beta_D vs Biased (75%)", x = "Trial", y = "Cumulative Matching Rate") +
  theme_minimal()
```



```{r}
ggplot(df4, aes(x = trial, y = cumulative_rateSelf, group = agent)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.15, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_line(data = df4_avg, aes(x = trial, y = mean_self, group = 1), color = "red", size = 1.2) +
  labs(title = "Cumulative Match Rate Across 100 Matchups: Beta_P vs Biased (75%)", x = "Trial", y = "Cumulative Matching Rate") +
  theme_minimal()
```
